---
execute:
  echo: false
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    fig.path: figures/
    fig.pos: H
params:
  university:
    values:
      CU: Curtin University
      AU: Adelaide University
      UQ: University of Queensland
    value: CU
date: last-modified
date-format: long
format: aagi-revealjs
bibliography: references.bib
csl: _extensions/AAGI-AUS/aagi/assets/biometrics.csl

title: !expr sprintf("AAGI – %s", switch(params$university, CU = "Curtin University", AU = "Adelaide University", UQ = "University of Queensland"))
author:
  - name: Adam Sparks
    orcid: 0000-0002-0061-8359
    email: adam.sparks@curtin.edu.au
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

if (!requireNamespace("pak", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages(
    "pak",
    repos = sprintf(
      "https://r-lib.github.io/p/pak/stable/%s/%s/%s",
      .Platform$pkgType,
      R.Version()$os,
      R.Version()$arch
    )
  )
}

ensure_pkg <- function(pkg, github = NULL) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    if (!is.null(github)) {
      pak::pak(github, dependencies = TRUE)
    } else {
      pak::pak(pkg, dependencies = TRUE)
    }
  }
}

ensure_pkg("ggplot2")
ensure_pkg("dplyr")
ensure_pkg("flextable")
ensure_pkg("gapminder")
ensure_pkg("gt")
ensure_pkg("AAGIThemes", github = "AAGI-AUS/AAGIThemes")
ensure_pkg("AAGIPalettes", github = "AAGI-AUS/AAGIPalettes")

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(flextable)
library(gapminder)
library(gt)
library(AAGIThemes)
library(AAGIPalettes)

theme_set(theme_aagi())
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_ft_aagi)
